column1: # Press BUTTON A to begin Phase 1 (Shade Test)
# === PHASE 1: SHADE TEST (25 Shades of Gray) ===
# Place centre sensor over shade patch 1 (black).
# Press B to capture readings.  Press A when done to skip to Phase 2.
# Place robot at black end of gradient strip.
# Press A when done to skip to Phase 3.
# Gradient 1 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 2 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 3 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 4 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 5 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
# Gradient 6 — logging started.  Push robot now.  Press B to stop.
